form.formComment: Could manage only eighth last time but caught the eye the start prior when he clocked a brilliant 22.13 over 390m finishing second at Shepparton. Expected to push the clock again here.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Good win last start as odds-on favourite by 6 lengths over 390m at this track in a handy 22.30, beating Pyrenees Blazer. Top chance again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good win last start as odds-on favourite by 6 lengths over 390m at this track in a handy 22.30, beating Pyrenees Blazer. Top chance again.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last time but was in the minors two on end prior to that, the most recent when second (22.72) at big odds over 390m at this track. Aided by a low draw but prefer each-way.

form.formComment: Strong performance to win by 1.1 lengths at Geelong over 400m (23.15) beating Solar Toby in Grade 5 on April 7. This looks too tough.

form.formComment: Has finished fifth at his last couple of starts, most recently at Bendigo over 425m. Not one of the leading chances on this occasion.

form.formComment: Finished third at big odds last time (22.51) over 390m at this track. Has to do a bit more.

formComments.comment: Finished third at big odds last time (22.51) over 390m at this track. Has to do a bit more.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 4th in a Grade 5 H on April 7 over 400m at Geelong behind South Of Heaven beaten 6 lengths (23.11). Yet to win but has been in the money five times from 10 starts off this box. Right in the mix.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Had been in consistent form with four minors on end before missing the frame last start when seventh (23.32) at Geelong. Boxed out wide and looks tested this line up.

form.formComment: Has finished seventh at his last couple of starts, most recently at Shepparton over 390m. Has ability and can run well.

form.formComment: Was out of the placings at final run of last campaign, finishing fifth (25.05) at Bendigo before going for a three-and-a-half months spell. Capable of playing a role in the finish.
